previous_observed_value.overall_conclusion: Baseline aktif sudah menyerap sebagian besar variasi threshold sederhana; eksperimen item 5 dan item 8 terutama terlihat redundant atau terlalu sempit.

overlap_refresh_findings.governance_refresh_conclusion: No newer governance-facing evidence was found that overturns the prior overlap conclusion. The active overlap basis still indicates that the active baseline absorbs most simple threshold variation and that the highest-risk overlap concerns remain unresolved.

evidence_summary: Item 5 still indicates threshold collapse toward the baseline rule set.
Item 8 still indicates adaptive search space remains centered too close to the baseline configuration.
No refreshed artifact was found that formally supersedes the prior high-overlap assessment for framework-governance purposes.
